title: Bulfus

The '''bulfus''' (plural: '''bulfusi''') was a large flying [[Mammal/Legends|mammal]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]]. Roughly [[Bat/Legends|bat]]-shaped but with [[Otter/Legends|otter]]-like features, bulfusi were skilled [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]] with a powerful [[Atmosphere/Legends|aerial]] attack.

==Biology and appearance==
[[Homeworld/Legends|Native]] to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]], bulfusi were [[Color/Legends|dark]]-[[Hair/Legends|furred]], muscular, [[Oil/Legends|oily]] [[Mammal/Legends|mammals]] with long whiskers and double-lidded [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]; those features gave them [[Otter/Legends|otter]]-like aspects, although the creatures were sleek and [[Bat/Legends|bat]]-like in shape. Bulfusi were intensely unpleasant-smelling when [[Water/Legends|wet]] which, considering their habitat and lifestyle, was often. Bulfus [[Youngling/Legends|pups]] clung to the upper dorsals of their [[Parent/Legends|parent]] until they reached five [[Standard month/Legends|months]] of age and learned to fly.<ref name="CCW" />

==Behavior==
Bulfusi were [[Standard day/Legends|nocturnal]] [[Diet/Legends|predators]] that lived in muddy waterside burrows and were capable of [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]] in water or in the [[Atmosphere/Legends|air]], in both cases descending to snatch small prey from undergrowth. While largely placid towards [[Human/Legends|Human]]-sized [[Species/Legends|beings]], bulfusi were highly protective of their offspring and would fiercely defend them if disturbed or threatened. A full-speed dive-bombing attack from a bulfus was capable of knocking a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] off its [[Limb/Legends|feet]]. Despite such behavior and a formidable bite, bulfusi could be domesticated with effort, but they made poor pets due to their large size and appetite. Even so, some of Corulag's inhabitants trained bulfusi as guard animals and entertainers.<ref name="CCW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bulfusi were first mentioned in the sourcebook ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'', which was published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] in [[2003]] for use with the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CCW" />
